ItacAcademyItem.Name: Costanti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Maylender has an entry dedicated to this Academy in his Storia delle Accademie d`Italia, but also warns that there is uncertainty about the real existence of this group.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
